rows.label: qev041304_MSG0001
rows.name:
Vasalts give me a lot of trouble
during exploration missions... but seeing them
like this on a card, they look pretty cool.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041304_MSG0002
rows.name:
...I want the card of the Vasalt I took down
during my exploration mission the other day, but
it just won't come out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041304_MSG0003
rows.name:
Good grief, to think I can't even get the item I want
when it's just a bronze card...
I have no choice but to curse my own bad luck.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041304_MSG0004
rows.name:
What is it?
Are you doing Miracolle trading?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041304_MSG0005
rows.name:
...I see, I definitely want that
Bronze Vasalt Card, but...
I don't have any good cards to trade for it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041304_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Ah! That's it!
How about trading it for this Diner meal ticket?
Heheh, the roast beef here is exquisite, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041304_MSG0007
rows.name:
Lucky!
Well, if it's a gluttonous guy, I bet they'd
trade you a card for this too, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041304_MSG0009
rows.name:
No good, huh...
The roast beef is seriously delicious, you know?[ST:wait ]
